positive: A mystical, whimsical woodland scene, featuring an illuminated forest silhouette at twilight. The central focus is a majestic, glowing bioluminescent moth perched gently on a crystalline mushroom. Surrounding the moth are delicate, stylized branches, fairy lights, and gentle, flowing steam, creating a sense of ethereal magic. High contrast black and white line art mixed with neon pops of color (teal, lavender, gold). Flat vector illustration style with deep black backgrounds and glowing subjects. Perfect for apparel print, centered composition, symmetrical balance, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, clean edges, graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, realistic, photo, 3d render, graffiti
